MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: State-Trait Anger Expression Inventory-2 Child/Adolescent (STAXI-2 C/A), pre-scan
MeasurementToolMetadata.InstructionsQ1-10: The sentences below talk about feelings people sometimes have. Read each sentence below and then click the response that indicates how you feel right now. There are no right or wrong answers. Be honest. Do not spend too much time on any sentence.
MeasurementToolMetadata.InstructionsQ11-20: The sentences below talk about feelings people sometimes have. Read each sentence below and then click the response that indicates how often you usually feel that way. There are no right or wrong answers. Be honest. Do not spend too much time on any sentence.
MeasurementToolMetadata.InstructionsQ21-35: Everyone feels angry from time to time, but people differ in what they do when they are angry. The sentences below talk about how you may feel or act when you are angry. Read each sentence and then click the response that best describes how often you feel or act that way when you are angry. There are no right or wrong answers. Be honest. Do not spend too much time on any sentence.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: The Anger Expression/Control subscales from items 21-35 were not scored due to uncertainty in the scoring key.

staxi2_ca_4.Description: I feel like shouting out loud

staxi2_ca_14.Description: I feel annoyed when I do a good job and no one notices me

staxi2_ca_15.Description: I get mad when I am punished unfairly

staxi2_ca_17.Description: I get angry when I do well and am told I did something wrong

staxi2_ca_18.Description: I feel angry when I am blamed for something I did not do

staxi2_ca_20.Description: I feel like yelling when I do something good and someone says I did bad

staxi2_ca_22.Description: If I do not like someone, I keep it a secret

staxi2_ca_30.Description: I try to calm my angry feelings

staxi2_ca_32.Description: I do something to relax and calm down

staxi2_ca_33.Description: I am afraid to show my anger

staxi2_ca_34.Description: I do things like slam doors

staxi2_ca_35.Description: I get mad inside, but do not show it

staxi2_ca_score_state_anger.Description: State Anger: sum of items 1-10. n/a if any item missing.

staxi2_ca_score_state_anger_feelings.Description: State Anger - Feeling Angry: sum of items 1,2,3,8,10.

staxi2_ca_score_state_anger_expression.Description: State Anger - Feel like Expressing Anger: sum of items 4,5,6,7,9.

staxi2_ca_score_trait_anger.Description: Trait Anger: sum of items 11-20. n/a if any item missing.

staxi2_ca_score_trait_anger_temperament.Description: Trait Anger - Temperament: sum of items 11,12,13,16,19.

staxi2_ca_score_trait_anger_reaction.Description: Trait Anger - Reaction: sum of items 14,15,17,18,20.
